global_description: Circular or rectangular device with a face displaying numbers or markers, hands indicating time, often with a glass cover and metallic or plastic frame, typically wall-mounted or standing.

part_details.face: Circular or rectangular with numbers or markers
part_details.hands: Thin, metallic, indicating hours and minutes
part_details.frame: Metallic or plastic, surrounding the face
part_details.numbers: Printed or embossed on the face
